title: Wire Brushes Drills Set 10 pcs,Brass Coated Wire Brush Wheel, Cup Brush and Tube Brush Kit,10 Sizes Metal Brushes with 1/4 Inch Shank for Cleaning Rust,Removing Paint and Cleaning Wood (Gold)
features: Wire Brushes Material:Metallic Wire Brush Drill Bit Set is made from high quality brass plated steel wires for effective surface cleaning and preparation.

Ideal Product:1/4"" shank fits most drills, Such as, drilling machines, cordless screwdrivers, hand drills and floor drills,These wire brush Hardened steel wire for reduced wire breakage and long life.
10 Sizes Metal Brushes:The set includes 10 different wire brushes, So you have a suitable wire brush for all cases,easy access into narrow holes and confined areas.
Multiple Uses:These brushes can be used for removing paint, rust, dirt from stone and other metallic surfaces.
For different tasks:The assortment of wheel, cup, end brush and spiral Brush sizes, makes it suitable for a variety of tasks and applications.
description: Product Description Cup Brush Remove rust or old coatings from metal surfaces. Grinding edge burrs on flat or curved surfaces and for surface brushing of hard stones such as granite. Wheel Brush Surface brushing or matte finishing of stainless steel, aluminium alloys (e.g. kitchenware, architectural decoration), heavy-duty descaling and wood texturing. End Brush Hole cleaning: after drilling to remove the inner wall burrs (such as engine block, hydraulic parts), and Slit treatment. Spiral Brush Remove scale, carbon or residue inside steel and copper pipes (e.g. chemical pipelines, heat exchangers). Safety Tips for Using Wire Brushes When using a high-speed rotating wire brush, always wear safety goggles and gloves to prevent wire breakage and splashing. Adjust the rotation speed according to the workpiece material to avoid overheating or excessive wear.

specifications_table.Recommended uses for product: ‎Paint Removal, Rust Removal, Cleaning, Debris Removal
